---
title: "Mauricio Moreno, PhD"
pagetitle: "Mauricio Moreno Website"
image: "files/images/me.png"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
format: html
page-layout: custom
about: 
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 300px
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:mmorenozambrano@gmail.com    
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mmorenozam/
      target: _blank
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=i_wIXdEAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
---


:::{#hero-heading}


**Welcome!**

Hi, and welcome to my personal website.

I'm a **Biostatistician and Data Scientist** with over ten years of experience applying statistical methods to real-world scientific problems in both academic research and industry. My work spans experimental design, statistical modeling, Bayesian methods, simulation, and reproducible data analysis, with a particular focus on translating complex data into clear, actionable insights.

Currently, I work at Bayer Crop Science, where I support research and development projects through study design, statistical analysis, and collaboration with multidisciplinary teams. Alongside my professional work, I have a strong interest in clinical research, statistical consulting, and the development of robust analytical workflows in R and SAS.

This website serves as a portfolio of my professional work, publications, technical projects, and educational activities. Whether you're a recruiter, collaborator, or fellow data enthusiast, I hope you find something useful here. Thanks for stopping by!



:::




<div class="experience-section">

<div class="experience-title">

## Education

</div>


<div class="timeline">


<div class="timeline-item">

<div class="timeline-marker"></div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### PhD in Bioinformatics

<span class="company">
Jacobs University Bremen
</span>

<span class="metadata">
2021 · Bremen, Germany
</span>

Thesis: "Mathematical modelling of cocoa bean fermentation processes"

</div>

</div>


<div class="timeline-item">

<div class="timeline-marker"></div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### MSc in Statistics

<span class="company">
Catholic University of Leuven
</span>

<span class="metadata">
2025 · Leuven, Belgium
</span>

Thesis: "Four-Level Meta-Analysis: A comparison with Three-Level Meta-Analysis"

</div>

</div>


<div class="timeline-item">

<div class="timeline-marker"></div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### BSc in Biotechnology

<span class="company">
Escuela Politécnica del Ejército
</span>

<span class="metadata">
2010 · Sangolguí, Ecuador
</span>

Thesis: "Urban waste-water treatment through the use of native *cyanobacteria* from the *Polylepis pauta* forest of Papallacta – Ecuador"

</div>

</div>


</div>

</div>


<div class="experience-section">

<div class="experience-title">

## Experience

</div>


<div class="timeline">


<div class="timeline-item current">

<div class="timeline-marker"></div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Biostatistics Scientist

<span class="company">
Bayer Crop Science
</span>

<span class="metadata">
Jun 2022 - Present · Monheim am Rhein, Germany
</span>

- Statistical support for R\&D projects across the study lifecycle.
- Experimental design, simulation-based power analysis, and statistical modelling.
- Collaboration with multidisciplinary teams to translate scientific questions into analytical strategies.

</div>

</div>


<div class="timeline-item">

<div class="timeline-marker"></div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Post-doctoral Researcher

<span class="company">
Research Institute for Farm Animal Biology
</span>

<span class="metadata">
Oct 2021 - Mar 2022 · Dummerstorf, Germany
</span>

- Provided statistical consulting to researchers, study design, analysis planning, and interpretation of results.
- Applied advanced statistical methods to ensure robust and reproducible analyses.
- Communicated statistical results to non-statistical collaborators.

</div>

</div>


<div class="timeline-item">

<div class="timeline-marker"></div>

<div class="timeline-content">

### Research Associate

<span class="company">
Jacobs University Bremen
</span>

<span class="metadata">
Feb 2016 - Aug 2021 · Bremen, Germany
</span>

- Developed statistical and Bayesian models to complex biological systems.
- Designed reproducible analytical workflows using R and Stan.
- Collaborated with experimental scientists to translate biological hypothesis into quantitative frameworks and statistical analyses (e.g., PCA, ANOVA, GLMM).

</div>

</div>


</div>

</div>


<div class="contact-section">

## Let's connect

I'm always interested in discussing statistical modelling,
data science, research collaborations, and teaching opportunities.

<div class="contact-links">

<a href="mailto:mmorenozambrano@gmail.com">
✉️ Email
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mmorenozam/" target="_blank">
💼 LinkedIn
</a>

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=i_wIXdEAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">
🎓 Google Scholar
</a>

</div>

</div>
